title: Add BinaryPH Quant to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [BinaryPH Quant](https://binary.ph/quant) to business
- BinaryPH Quant converts headlines into numerical signals and continuously gathers verified news, scoring each event by credibility using Pollinations.AI.

Fixes #9012

gist.headline: News into numbers
gist.blurb: BinaryPH Quant just landed in the greenhouse! This clever new app uses Pollinations to score news credibility and turn daily headlines into numerical signals.
gist.summary: Added BinaryPH Quant to the community apps showcase, a tool that converts headlines into numerical signals and scores news credibility using Pollinations.AI.
gist.impact: The community can now explore how BinaryPH Quant leverages our API to analyze and quantify the credibility of real-world news events.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an app that turns news headlines into numerical data (quant). The visual should feature Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot analyzing a newspaper or news feed that is magically transforming into data points or charts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a pixelated newspaper alongside the chunky monitor robot. The robot's screen shows news headlines transforming into glowing numbers and tiny bar charts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
